2339000.name: Portabellows
2339000.description:
Portabellows is an adventure of exploration and a collectathon. Find recipes and ingredients to bake pies, and help quirky castaway residents off the island. Discover the mystery of what's keeping them there. New abilities will help you access more and more whimsical areas!

Story time

You are Erma, retired, relaxing by the beach in your quiet island paradise when you see a plane falling out of the sky. There starts your adventure, following clues as to where the plane landed (certainly not in one piece) and help out!

Help new friends by collecting everything 

Collect jelly beans in the world to trade with a shopkeeper for seeds, useful items and upgrades. Complete collections that your new friends need or desire: missing plane pieces, relics and more, they'll reward you with mementos that'll help you get to know them. Go above and beyond in your collecting to get rewarded with cute outfits!

Classic Platforming Fun 

Explore every corner of the island: jump, sprint, swim, and more to traverse scenic landscapes full of all sorts of mushrooms (including giant portobello mushrooms!). Procure new abilities by exploring every path. Be victorious in challenge rooms, mysteriously in place to recover lost treasures: platforming challenges and puzzles.

Gather ingredients to bake pies fit for a hungry glutton

Find them in every nook and cranny of the island. Obtain eggs as a reward for reuniting lost chicklings with their mama. Fill in the pages of your journal and recipe book, discovering lost pages featuring location hints of ancient recipes and other secrets!

Pie Making

Combine your ingredients to bake delicious pies step by step. Delight in seeing each unique pie’s delicious result. Wonder who those pie orders are for?

About Us

We're a team of two, this is our passion project and we can't wait for you to enjoy your time in Portabellows! We hope to tickle your imagination!
